TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Pey-cin-yi-he-yun ŚĆóšļ¨ť†§ŚíĆŚúí Pey-cin-yi-he-yun nu cin-caw a kitidaan nu hung-ti atu tabakiyay a idangan nu luma' nu hung-ti, u eneng i Cung-kul Pey-cin-se Hay-tin kenis nu timulan nu amisan, u ahebal 297 a kubu. misanga' tu Yi-he-yun sa i cin-caw ciyan-lung mihcan, muliyaw patideng i kuwang-si mihcan, nanu cin-caw Pey-cin si-ciyaw sansan nu yin. Yi-he-yun matineng muha nu tandaw patideng atu nu lahad a buyu atu nanum mupulung tu a idangan u katinengan namin nu i kitakit a nipisanga', u tatelungan nu misangay tu nalimaan a Cung-kul liyen. Yi-heyun sausien tu liwan nu kitakit a lalangawan. cin-caw-cen-yen mihcan, angangan nu cin ci Wan-yen-liyang i tida i siyang-san, i ci-yen-san patideng tu cin-san kitidan. yun-caw mamin mititu i Pey-cin, ci Kul-sew-cin mikali tu makapabaw a nanum, muwala tu pay-hu-cun-sen-san a nanum atu i lilisay a nanum pacumud i banaw, satabaki satu ku nanum, malanananumen nu paw-cang-kung atu sapabeli tu caw-ci-yun a sasasupen tu nanum a tangku. .
S.PHON: p…ô- ¶in-ji-ńß…ô-jun ***** p…ô- ¶in-ji-ńß…ô-jun nu ¶in- ¶aw a kitidaan nu ńßuŇč-ti atu tabakijaj a idaŇčan nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu ńßuŇč-ti, u …ôn…ôŇč i ¶uŇč-kur~…ĺ p…ô- ¶in-s…ô ńßaj-tin k…ônis nu timur~…ĺan nu amisan, u ańß…ôbar~…ĺ *** a kubu. misaŇča Ē~ ° tu ji-ńß…ô-jun sa i ¶in- ¶aw ¶ijan-r~…ĺuŇč mińß ¶an, mur~…ĺijaw patid…ôŇč i kuwaŇč-si mińß ¶an, nanu ¶in- ¶aw p…ô- ¶in si- ¶ijaw sansan nu jin. ji-ńß…ô-jun matin…ôŇč muńßa nu tandaw patid…ôŇč atu nu r~…ĺańßad a buju atu nanum mupur~…ĺuŇč tu a idaŇčan u katin…ôŇčan namin nu i kitakit a nipisaŇča Ē~ °, u tat…ôr~…ĺuŇčan nu misaŇčaj tu nar~…ĺimaan a ¶uŇč-kur~…ĺ r~…ĺij…ôn. ji-ńß…ôun sausi…ôn tu r~…ĺiwan nu kitakit a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan. ¶in- ¶aw- ¶…ôn-j…ôn mińß ¶an, aŇčaŇčan nu ¶in ¶i wan-j…ôn-r~…ĺijaŇč i tida i sijaŇč-san, i ¶i-j…ôn-san patid…ôŇč tu ¶in-san kitidan. jun- ¶aw mamin mititu i p…ô- ¶in, ¶i kur~…ĺ-s…ôw- ¶in mikar~…ĺi tu makapabaw a nanum, muwar~…ĺa tu paj-ńßu- ¶un-s…ôn-san a nanum atu i r~…ĺir~…ĺisaj a nanum pa ¶umud i banaw, satabaki satu ku nanum, mar~…ĺanananum…ôn nu paw- ¶aŇč-kuŇč atu sapab…ôr~…ĺi tu ¶aw- ¶i-jun a sasasup…ôn tu nanum a taŇčku. .
S.FORM: Pey-cin-yi-he-yun ŚĆóšļ¨ť†§ŚíĆŚúí Pey-cin-yi-he-yun nu cin-caw a kitidaan nu hung-ti atu tabakiyay a idangan nu luma' nu hung-ti, u eneng i Cung-kul Pey-cin-se Hay-tin kenis nu timulan nu amisan, u ahebal 297 a kubu. misanga' tu Yi-he-yun sa i cin-caw ciyan-lung mihcan, muliyaw patideng i kuwang-si mihcan, nanu cin-caw Pey-cin si-ciyaw sansan nu yin. Yi-he-yun matineng muha nu tandaw patideng atu nu lahad a buyu atu nanum mupulung tu a idangan u katinengan namin nu i kitakit a nipisanga', u tatelungan nu misangay tu nalimaan a Cung-kul liyen. Yi-heyun sausien tu liwan nu kitakit a lalangawan. cin-caw-cen-yen mihcan, angangan nu cin ci Wan-yen-liyang i tida i siyang-san, i ci-yen-san patideng tu cin-san kitidan. yun-caw mamin mititu i Pey-cin, ci Kul-sew-cin mikali tu makapabaw a nanum, muwala tu pay-hu-cun-sen-san a nanum atu i lilisay a nanum pacumud i banaw, satabaki satu ku nanum, malanananumen nu paw-cang-kung atu sapabeli tu caw-ci-yun a sasasupen tu nanum a tangku. .
S.PHON: p…ô- ¶in-ji-ńß…ô-jun ***** p…ô- ¶in-ji-ńß…ô-jun nu ¶in- ¶aw a kitidaan nu ńßuŇč-ti atu tabakijaj a idaŇčan nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu ńßuŇč-ti, u …ôn…ôŇč i ¶uŇč-kur~…ĺ p…ô- ¶in-s…ô ńßaj-tin k…ônis nu timur~…ĺan nu amisan, u ańß…ôbar~…ĺ *** a kubu. misaŇča Ē~ ° tu ji-ńß…ô-jun sa i ¶in- ¶aw ¶ijan-r~…ĺuŇč mińß ¶an, mur~…ĺijaw patid…ôŇč i kuwaŇč-si mińß ¶an, nanu ¶in- ¶aw p…ô- ¶in si- ¶ijaw sansan nu jin. ji-ńß…ô-jun matin…ôŇč muńßa nu tandaw patid…ôŇč atu nu r~…ĺańßad a buju atu nanum mupur~…ĺuŇč tu a idaŇčan u katin…ôŇčan namin nu i kitakit a nipisaŇča Ē~ °, u tat…ôr~…ĺuŇčan nu misaŇčaj tu nar~…ĺimaan a ¶uŇč-kur~…ĺ r~…ĺij…ôn. ji-ńß…ôun sausi…ôn tu r~…ĺiwan nu kitakit a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan. ¶in- ¶aw- ¶…ôn-j…ôn mińß ¶an, aŇčaŇčan nu ¶in ¶i wan-j…ôn-r~…ĺijaŇč i tida i sijaŇč-san, i ¶i-j…ôn-san patid…ôŇč tu ¶in-san kitidan. jun- ¶aw mamin mititu i p…ô- ¶in, ¶i kur~…ĺ-s…ôw- ¶in mikar~…ĺi tu makapabaw a nanum, muwar~…ĺa tu paj-ńßu- ¶un-s…ôn-san a nanum atu i r~…ĺir~…ĺisaj a nanum pa ¶umud i banaw, satabaki satu ku nanum, mar~…ĺanananum…ôn nu paw- ¶aŇč-kuŇč atu sapab…ôr~…ĺi tu ¶aw- ¶i-jun a sasasup…ôn tu nanum a taŇčku. .
